description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold prints in clutches with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe. Product Details Black textured wallet with a flap with magetic button closure and a buckle closure One main compartment with a zippered pocket, two separators and eight card slots One long shoulder handle in metal Material and Care Shell: 100% polyurethane and lining: 100% polyester Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 11 cm Width: 19 cm
